description: UK-based scheduling API platform providing universal calendar integration and appointment scheduling. Single API connects to Google Calendar, Outlook, iCloud, and other calendar services. Healthcare-specific features for patient scheduling and resource management.
business_model: B2B - Scheduling API to healthcare applications
target_market: Healthcare applications, telemedicine platforms, practice management systems
competitive_advantage: Single API for all calendars, healthcare-specific features, GDPR compliant

varden_fit.rationale: HIGH FIT - Scheduling infrastructure that could power Varden's booking system. Direct complement to Zymego.
